Name: Verify User cannot purchase credits via top pane
Description:
Invite member with User role.
Verify that:
    - User cannot purchase credits via top pane.

Name: Verify Manager can purchase organization credits with predefined value
Description:
Invite member with Manager role.
Verify that:
    - Manager can purchase credits using predefined value(10, 100, 1000).

Name: Verify Admin can purchase organization credits with custom amount
Description:
Verify that:
    - Admin can purchase credits by input custom amount.
